hero.subhead: AI-first engineering & architectural transformations · Claude Code, AWS & GCP · Ex-Mercado Libre · Ex-IADB.

ittiSplit.kicker: itti · Engineering across two mobile products
ittiSplit.title: AI-driven engineering across an entire product ecosystem
ittiSplit.leftDesc: Architectural redesign of a React Native + microservices mobile platform on AWS. Stability and performance lift that restored user retention and engineering momentum — the methodology that earned the muv reassignment.
ittiSplit.rightDesc: Full architectural transformation of a high-concurrency platform (React Native + Java microservices, AWS + GCP). Micro-apps decoupled deploys, AI-assisted dev across a 12-person team, observability + incident response brought to production grade.
ittiSplit.whatDidIntro: Two products inside itti's ecosystem. Same playbook, different scale: stabilize, redesign, ship, then turn the same approach into team-level AI adoption.
bullets: Aligned engineering, product and design across a matrix org — negotiated priorities with business stakeholders, engaged senior leadership on technical strategy and quarterly planning.
Designed and shipped micro-apps architecture that decoupled mobile deploys, unblocking independent team velocity.
Introduced AI-assisted development (Claude Code, Cursor, Superpowers) across a 12-person team — faster cycles, less repetitive overhead.
Championed code review culture, observability tooling and incident response that brought reliability to production-grade levels.
Cloud infrastructure on AWS + GCP — compliance, scalability and uptime as engineering org-wide standards.

meli.title: Financial infrastructure trusted by 100+ internal teams

cards.title: Transfers & Debts engine
cards.desc: Co-architected high-stakes Golang processing tools running daily multi-million-dollar batches at MercadoPago's operational core.

cards.title: One Source
cards.desc: MercadoPago's main visibility console — single pane pulling from every API across the ecosystem. Daily contact with most engineering teams in the company.

cards.title: Frontend Framework
cards.desc: Drove adoption and evolution of a widely-used internal frontend framework — thousands of projects depended on it, other frameworks built on top of it.

idb.title: Engineering inside one of the world's most influential multilateral banks

stats.label: Cross-functional people managed across engineering, design, product, and policy.
Time-to-market reduction via Angular + Vue microfrontends and targeted tech-debt work.
Direct technical-strategy reporting line. Roadmap influence across a large matrix org.

topSkills.title: What I bring to an engineering org
topSkills.desc: Highlighted by LinkedIn from peers + leaders I've worked with.

items.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
items.desc: Designing agentic systems that compose tools, memory, and harness in production.

items.title: Engineering Management
items.desc: Scaling teams from 8 to 60+ across matrix organizations. High-trust delivery culture.

items.title: Software Architecture
items.desc: Microservices, microfrontends, high-concurrency platforms, AWS + GCP. Redesigns that ship.

aiIntro.title: Where AI changes how teams ship
aiIntro.desc: Practical, deliverable, repeatable. From org-wide Claude Code rollouts to side projects pushing agentic workflows past the obvious — and the management practice required to make it real.

lectures.title: Speaking on AI-first engineering — beyond the demo
lectures.body: Talks aimed at engineering and management teams. Not just "how to become AI-first" — the harder management-scope problems nobody is talking about: incident playbooks, code review semantics, secret management, harness composition.

talks.title: Harness & Agentic Workflows
talks.body: How to compose tools, memory, and the agent loop that actually ships product. Patterns from real rollouts at itti.

talks.title: Management in an AI-first world
talks.body: Code review when AI is in the room. Incident recovery when the bug was AI-authored. Secret management, harness integration, agentic workflow design — the management problems the demos never cover.

ittiAi.title: Driving AI-first transformation across thousands of engineers
ittiAi.desc: Member of itti's core AI team (<40 people) gesting the AI-first transition for an engineering org of thousands. My contribution went beyond the obvious.
points: Code review semantics when AI authored the diff. Trust signals, blast radius, rollback playbooks.
Incident recovery when the bug is AI-authored — debugging conventions, escalation paths, post-mortem framing.
Secret management + harness integration so agents can act without leaking credentials or context.
Spec-Driven Development (SDD) + deep agents — composable workflows the rest of the org can adopt without rewriting.

sideProject.title: An agentic RPG platform pushing the architecture further
sideProject.lede: Multi-tenant agentic platform for tabletop RPG. Helps DMs and players create characters, build full campaigns, translate adventures across rulesets — without reading thousands of pages of source material.

cards.title: Graph-per-tenant, graph-per-campaign
cards.body: Each campaign is its own graph. Lore, characters, and rule references stay isolated and queryable.

cards.title: Translation layer between rulesets
cards.body: Bridges D&D 5e, Pathfinder, Vampire: the Masquerade and more — non-compatible schemas reconciled in one runtime.

cards.title: Multi-provider LLM routing
cards.body: Claude + GPT in the same pipeline. Pick the right model per task — reasoning, narration, world-building, character builder.

cards.title: Custom tools + harness in-code and as product
cards.body: Custom tools, in-code harness for trusted ops, and a product-level harness for end-user agents to compose without leaking context.

cards.title: Beyond SaaS — agents you can subscribe to
cards.body: Not just a SaaS app: every campaign gets its own scheduled, persistent agent. Identity, memory, and orchestration are first-class.

cards.title: Agentic loops on a clock
cards.body: Long-running, scheduled workflows that prep next session, reconcile state, and surface plot threads the DM forgot.

certs.title: Anthropic Claude curriculum
certs.subtitle: Claude Code, MCP, subagents, agent skills, Claude API.

dnd.title: Dungeons & Dragons
dnd.body: Dungeon Master with friends. Organization, creativity, improvisation, and the long-game patience that translates back to engineering leadership. Also the seed of the D&D AI Companion side project.

pulls.v: Leadership rhythm — and the seed of a side project

spirit.title: Spirituality
spirit.body: Studious by nature, focused on non-duality. Applying it day-to-day to deconstruct, soften ego, and become a calmer, more complete person — better partner, better leader, better human.
spirit.pull: Less ego, more presence. Better partner, better leader, better human.
